comments: Approved based on direct review of commit 9b56fb2. The commit modifies only scripts/doctor.py, scripts/verify_protocol.py, scripts/validate_workflow_state.py, plus the allowed artifacts tasks/v0.8-m6-execution-result.json and tasks/v0.8-m6-result-review-packet.json. Each legacy Python script now emits a V0.8 deprecation warning to stderr from its __main__ execution path and then continues its prior logic via main(). No physical deletion of the Python files occurred, no MCP server files were modified, and workflow/dispatch.json was not changed, so workflow and dispatch state semantics remain intact.
